benefits.title: The Essence of Purity
benefits.subtitle: Why Choose Our Cow-Based Products?
benefits.b1Desc: Sourced directly from indigenous cows raised with love, free from synthetic chemicals.
benefits.b2Desc: Our cows are treated as family, respected and nurtured throughout their lives.
benefits.b3Desc: Prepared using ancient Ayurvedic methods to preserve nutritional and spiritual value.
benefits.b4Desc: Sustainable farming practices that enrich the soil and protect the environment.

donation.subtitle: Your contribution helps us provide shelter, medical care, and nutrition to hundreds of cows.

metadata.title: మేరిగోమాత - గోవుల సంక్షేమం & సహజ ఉత్పత్తులు
metadata.description: గోవు ఆధారిత ఉత్పత్తులు, ఈవెంట్‌లు మరియు విరాళాల కోసం ఈ-కామర్స్ ప్లాట్‌ఫారమ్.
